intents.text: Should the Ctrl+I shortcut hint be added to the popup UI?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: ctrl i 是否应该加在 popup 里指示

intents.text: Add the Ctrl+I shortcut indication in the popup, and also add it to the VitePress documentation if missing.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: vitepress 文档里没有的话也加上

intents.text: Run bun run format and then commit the changes.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: bun run format 然后提交
